steps.title: Identify what emphasizing the Mohs scale number means
steps.content: To emphasize a fact means to state it directly as the central focus of the sentence, not as a supporting detail.

steps.title: Find which choice puts fluorite's number at the center
steps.content:
C opens with “Fluorite has a Mohs scale number of 4,” positioning fluorite's number as the explicit focus.
  • A centers quartz and gives quartz's Mohs number (7), while mentioning fluorite only as something quartz can scratch
  • B omits fluorite entirely
  • D avoids any specific numbers


That is the correct answer.
